description: Detects potential memory/goroutine leak patterns in Go: goroutines launched inside loops (goroutine_in_loop), defer inside loops (defer_in_loop), and unbounded appends in loops. JSON version matches for_statement containing go_statement or defer_statement. Languages field scoped to go only to avoid conflict with Rust memory_leak_indicators pipeline (same pipeline name). JSON cannot detect unbounded append -- covered by goroutine/defer patterns.

flag.message: goroutine launched inside loop -- may cause goroutine leak or unbounded concurrency
